overview: Kick back and catch your favourite movies with the TCL PlayCube. Thanks to built-in Google TV, all your favourite streaming apps - including Netflix and Prime - are ready to roll. With a massive 150" display, your wall basically becomes a cinema screen. Its 750 lumens brightness and 1,000,000:1 contrast ratio help keep the picture sharp and detailed . And the combo of 5 W speakers and Dolby Dolby Digital Plus makes sure the sound pulls you right into the action.  Good to know  - Everything looks crisp, colourful, and seriously cinematic with Full HD display - Hook it up via WiFi or Bluetooth and stream straight from your phone or tablet - Auto-focus and keystone keep your picture sharp and centred - no fiddling, just plug and play - You can connect your favourite peripherals using USB, HDMI and 3.5 mm jack - The Auto Eye Protection keeps things easy on your eyes during those epic binge sessions
